nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Lavagna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmine, Attilio, Carlo, Cataldo, Enrico, Gaetano, Gennaro, Rocco, Sal.  Spanish Alfonso, Glicerio, Liborio.

Italian: ethnic name for a member of the Alemanni, an ancient Germanic people inhabiting what is now southern Germany, from a shortened form of Alamagna ‘Alemannia’, i.e. ‘land of the Alemanni’. Compare Lamanna .

variants.name: Lamanna
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Carlo, Carmine, Vito, Luigi, Pasquale, Sal, Amedeo, Anella, Angelo, Carmelo.
(also La Manna): topographic name from manna, a term denoting a type of ash tree, + the definite article la.

en.lifeSummary: Robobaldo I di Lavagna Count of Lavagna was born in 1060, in Genova, Liguria, Italy. He had at least 2 sons. He died in 1096, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Robobaldo I di Lavagna Count of Lavagna est né en 1060, à Genova, Liguria, Italie. Il a eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1096, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Robobaldo I di Lavagna Count of Lavagna wurde 1060 in Genova, Liguria, Italien geboren. Er hatte mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1096 im Alter von 36 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Robobaldo I di Lavagna Count of Lavagna è nato il nel 1060 nel Genova, Liguria, Italia. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1096, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.Genoa, Liguria, Italy: イタリアリグリアジェノヴァ
ja.lifeSummary: Robobaldo I di Lavagna Count of Lavagnaは1060年にイタリアリグリアジェノヴァで生まれた。彼は少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1096年に36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robobaldo I di Lavagna Count of Lavagna(은)는 1060년 이탈리아 리구리아 노바에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1096년 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robobaldo I di Lavagna Count of Lavagna nasceu em 1060, em Genova, Liguria, Itália. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1096, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Robobaldo I di Lavagna Count of Lavagna родился в 1060 г. в местности дженова, лигуря, Италия. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1096 г. в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Robobaldo I di Lavagna Count of Lavagna nació en 1060, en Genova, Liguria, Italia. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1096, a la edad de 36 años.
